final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a classical Chinese beauty in refined Hanfu sitting on a wooden pavilion in a Jiangnan water town.

Style/medium: Chinese gongbi painting meets xieyi ink-wash aesthetics, photorealistic with delicate brushwork texture, East Asian fine art photography
Composition: symmetrical framing, medium shot with slight elevation, subject seated on pavilion turning back to gaze into distance, 50mm equivalent lens
Subject: elegant woman in refined Hanfu with pale cyan silk and gold embroidery, intricate updo adorned with jade hairpins and pearl ornaments, holding a round silk fan, delicate classical makeup
Scene/backdrop: traditional Jiangnan water town with white-walled black-tiled Hui-style architecture, winding bluestone paths, lotus pond in full bloom with pink-white flowers swaying in breeze, crystal water droplets on lotus leaves, egrets skimming the water surface
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle morning atmosphere, serene and poetic mood
Color palette: pale cyan and gold as primary, soft pink-white lotus accents, muted greens, ink-black architectural details, overall restrained and elegant
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric with subtle sheen, intricate gold thread embroidery, smooth jade and lustrous pearls, weathered wood grain of pavilion, velvety lotus petals with water droplets
Avoid: 8K stuffer terms, oversaturated colors, modern elements, deformed hands, plastic-looking fabrics, western architectural details
